data.title: Atmus Filtration Technologies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 1, 2026
data.description: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc., a prominent player in the filtration sector trading on NYSE under the ticker ATMU, disclosed its plan to release the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 on Friday, May 1, 2026, before the market opens. Subsequently, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 10:00 a.m. CT to converse over the financial results with investors. Both a live webcast and a replay of the conference call will be available through the Atmus investor relations platform.

data.title: US Foods to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp (NYSE: USFD) is set to discuss its first quarter 2026 results through a live conference call and webcast on May 7, 2026, at 8 a.m. CDT. To participate, individuals can join the call by dialing 877-344-2001 and providing the Conference ID 2528845 at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time. A post-call replay will also be accessible. For those interested in listening to the replay of the conference call, registration is required.

data.title: BD Earns Industry Top Honors for Transparency, Resiliency and Partnership
data.description: A globally recognized medical technology company, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), based in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, was recently announced as the sole supplier to be honored by the Healthcare Industry Resilience Collaborative (HIRC). This recognition came during HIRC's inaugural Member Choice event held on April 16, 2026. BD, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol BDX, stands out in the industry for its innovative contributions.

data.title: Insteel Industries Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Mount Airy, North Carolina, Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), known as the leading producer of steel wire reinforcing products for concrete construction in the U.S., disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on March 28, 2026. Key figures from the Second Quarter 2026 include net earnings hitting $5.2 million, equivalent to $0.27 per share, with net sales reaching $172.7 million. The gross profit stood at $16.5 million, accounting for 9.6% of net sales, while the company's net cash balance was reported at $1 million.

data.title: Blockstream CEO advocates for voluntary upgrades to make Bitcoin quantum-proof, in opposition to BIP-361 which mandates freezes on quantum-vulnerable Bitcoin.
data.description: The CEO of Blockstream has a different perspective compared to BIP-361, a proposal suggesting enforced pauses for quantum-exposed Bitcoin.

data.title: Miami International Holdings Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MIAX), a top-notch technology-focused company specializing in managing regulated financial markets spanning various asset classes, is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter closing in March. Based out of Princeton, N.J. and Miami, the organization is known for its robust market performance and strategic initiatives. Stay tuned for detailed insights and figures on their quarterly performance.

data.title: Blue Moon Announces Results of Nussir Project Feasibility Study
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. is pleased to report robust economic performance, with an average annual free cash flow of $77 million based on consensus prices. The company, listed on both TSXV as MOON and NASDAQ as BMM, has successfully completed a feasibility study.

data.title: BNY Declares Dividends
data.description: On April 16, 2026, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) disclosed dividends for its common and preferred stock. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend for common stock. This announcement affects the company's shares listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BK. BNY, a prominent global financial services firm, continues to prioritize shareholder returns through these dividend declarations.

data.title: BNY Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In its recent financial report for the first quarter of 2026, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY), a prominent financial services company traded on NYSE under the symbol BK, announced its quarterly results. The company shared earnings information and updates in a presentation.

data.title: After 35 Years with Parkinson's Disease and a Life-Threatening Infection, One Patient Reclaimed Independent Living
data.description: Shanghai, April 16, 2026 - Jiahui International Hospital commemorated World Parkinson's Day by showcasing a remarkable case illustrating the intricate care involved in advanced Parkinson's disease. The hospital highlighted the success of multidisciplinary teamwork in achieving functional recovery, even in the face of severe complications. This case underscores the hospital's commitment to providing holistic care for Parkinson's patients, emphasizing the importance of collaboration in treating complex medical conditions.

data.title: ITT to Release 2026 First Quarter Results and 2026 Outlook on Wednesday, May 6
data.description: ITT Inc. (NYSE: ITT) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, May 6.

data.title: Thompson Street Capital Partners Announces Sale of Data Dimensions to One Call
data.description: St. Louis-established middle-market private equity firm Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP) recently disclosed the sale of its portfolio company, Data Dimensions, LLC, to One Call, a prominent figure in ancillary services and care management for the workers’ compensation market, utilizing technology. Data Dimensions, headquartered in Janesville, Wisconsin since 1982, serves as a significant player in EDI clearinghouse and technology fields. The finances involved in this transaction were not made public.
